recap: Created is-zsh-autoload-function: sets REPLY=1 for no-extension files under functions/autoload/, REPLY=0 otherwise; includes bats test suite.

Replaced inline autoload path checks in is-zsh, rule-missing-err-return, and fzf-colorize-path with calls to is-zsh-autoload-function; added zsh:color fallback in fzf-colorize-path before executable check.
Converted better-ls from bash to ZSH; added fi= LS_COLORS override scoped to exa invocation when inside a functions/autoload directory; bats test suite covers autoload and non-autoload cases.
